mapper.select:
SELECT -- SampleInfo (datetime -> long) UNIX_TIMESTAMP(si.collect_date) * 1000 AS collectDate, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(si.received_date) * 1000 AS receivedDate,
-- 数值转换 ROUND(ei.patient_height) AS patientHeight, -- 四舍五入转整数 CAST(ei.patient_weight AS CHAR) AS patientWeight,
-- 计算字段 (gestational_weeks * 7 + gestational_days) (IFNULL(ei.gestational_weeks, 0) * 7 + IFNULL(ei.gestational_days, 0)) AS gestationalWeeks,
CONCAT(IFNULL(pi.current_address, ''), IFNULL(pi.current_address_detail, '')) AS patientAddress,
-- 其他字段 (直接映射) si.product_no AS productNo, si.product_name AS productName, si.sample_id AS sampleId, si.old_sample_num AS oldSampleNum, si.sample_type AS sampleType, si.shipment_condition AS shipmentCondition, si.tube_type AS tubeType, si.additional_report_flag AS additionalReportFlag, si.clinic_num AS clinicNum, si.hospital_name AS hospitalName, si.doctor_name AS doctorName, pi.name AS patientName, pi.identity AS patientIdCard, pi.phone AS patientMobile, pi.patient_tel AS patientTel, pi.emergency_contact AS emergentName, pi.emergent_relation AS emergentRelation, pi.emergency_contact_phone AS emergentTel, pi.birthday AS patientBirthday, ei.fetus_type AS fetusType, ei.patient_age AS patientAge, ei.chorion_type AS chorion, ei.b_ultrasonography AS bUltrasonography, ei.ivf_flag AS ivfFlag, ei.conception_method AS conceptionMethod, ei.bh_gravidity AS bhGravidity, ei.bh_parity AS bhParity, ei.bh_other AS bhOther, ei.amniocentesis_result AS amniocentesis, ei.illness_history_past AS illnessHistoryPast, ei.illness_history_present AS illnessHistoryPresent, ei.illness_history_allergy AS illnessHistoryAllergy, ei.illness_history_genetic AS illnessHistoryGenetic, ei.patient_remark AS patientRemark, ei.patient_edd AS patientEdd, ei.last_menstrual_period AS lastMenstrualPeriod, tr.down_screening_result AS downScreening FROM t_lis_sample si LEFT JOIN t_mchi_patient pi ON si.patient_oid = pi.oid LEFT JOIN t_lis_examination ei ON si.oid = ei.sample_oid LEFT JOIN t_lis_test_result tr ON si.oid = tr.sample_oid WHERE si.old_sample_num = #{oldSampleNum}
SELECT blood_collection_time FROM t_mchi_blood_film_management WHERE screening_archives_id = #{screeningArchivesId, jdbcType=BIGINT} LIMIT 1

SELECT -- 基本信息 bf.experiment_number AS sampleId, bf.experiment_number AS oldSampleNum, bf.screening_archives_id AS screeningArchivesId,
-- SampleInfo 字段（数值类型转 String） CAST(si.sample_type AS CHAR) AS sampleType, CAST(si.shipment_condition AS CHAR) AS shipmentCondition, CAST(si.tube_type AS CHAR) AS tubeType, si.product_no AS productName,
-- PatientInfo 字段 pi.phone, pi.identity, pi.emergency_contact AS emergencyContact, pi.emergency_contact_phone AS emergencyContactPhone,
-- ExaminationInfo 字段 ei.patient_age AS age, ei.patient_height AS height, ei.patient_weight AS weight, ei.bh_gravidity AS bhGravidity, ei.bh_parity AS bhParity, ei.bh_other AS bhOther, ei.ivf_flag AS ivfFlag, ei.tubebaby_type AS tubebabyType, CAST(ei.fetus_type AS CHAR) AS fetusType, CAST(ei.fetus_type AS CHAR) AS pregnancy, ei.gestational_weeks AS gestationalWeeks, ei.gestational_days AS gestationalDays, ei.us_check AS usCheck, ei.us_result AS usResult, DATE_FORMAT(ei.reduce_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS reduceDate, ei.down_symdrome_flag AS downSymdromeFlag, ei.down_symdrome_result1 AS downSymdromeResult1, ei.down_symdrome_result2 AS downSymdromeResult2, ei.down_symdrome_result_oth AS downSymdromeResultOth, ei.puncture_appointment AS punctureAppointment, DATE_FORMAT(ei.puncture_appointment_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS punctureAppointmentDate, ei.transplantation AS transplantation, DATE_FORMAT(ei.transplantation_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS transplantationDate, ei.allogeneic_transfusion AS allogeneicTransfusion, DATE_FORMAT(ei.allogeneic_transfusion_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS allogeneicTransfusionDate, ei.immunotherapy AS immunotherapy, DATE_FORMAT(ei.immunotherapy_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS immunotherapyDate, ei.immunotherapy_type AS immunotherapyType, ei.special_case AS specialCase, ei.patient_remark AS remark FROM t_mchi_blood_film_management bf LEFT JOIN t_lis_sample si ON bf.experiment_number = si.sample_id LEFT JOIN t_mchi_patient pi ON si.patient_oid = pi.oid LEFT JOIN t_lis_examination ei ON si.oid = ei.sample_oid WHERE bf.screening_archives_id = #{screeningArchivesId} LIMIT 1
